note: jquery_ui_checkboxradio is a passive asset/library provider (no config UI, no permissions, no services, no .module or .libraries.yml of its own), so all cases are `recipe` (response-graded), not `execution` (live-state). Facts are grounded in data.json, usage.md, and agent/theming/jquery_ui_checkboxradio.md.

evals.prompt: On a Drupal 11 site, why would I install the contrib `jquery_ui_checkboxradio` module? What does it actually provide?
evals.expected_output: It re-provides the single jQuery UI Checkboxradio widget asset library as a contrib module after jQuery UI was deprecated and removed from Drupal core, so existing themes/modules keep working. It has no config, permissions or services.

evals.prompt: What is the exact library id provided for the jQuery UI Checkboxradio widget?
In a Drupal 11 render array I need the jQuery UI Checkboxradio widget. Give the exact `#attached` line to attach it.
In my own module's *.libraries.yml, how do I make my JS library depend on the jQuery UI Checkboxradio widget? Show the YAML.
Does the jquery_ui_checkboxradio module have its own libraries file, or does it depend on another module to register the Checkboxradio library?
evals.expected_output: It has no *.libraries.yml of its own. It depends on the base jquery_ui module (>=8.x-1.7 / composer ^1.7), whose hook_library_info_alter() reads jquery_ui.libraries.data.json and registers the jquery_ui_checkboxradio/checkboxradio library and vendored assets.

evals.prompt: Where is the configuration/settings page for the jquery_ui_checkboxradio module, and what permissions does it add?
evals.expected_output: There is none: jquery_ui_checkboxradio has no configuration UI, no permissions and no services. You simply install it and attach the library you need.

evals.prompt: If I attach jquery_ui_checkboxradio/checkboxradio, do I also need to attach jquery_ui/widget myself?
evals.expected_output: No. The checkboxradio library declares its dependencies (core/jquery, jquery_ui/widget, and jQuery UI internal helper libraries), so they are pulled in automatically.
